channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Want a Blu-ray writer and a 13th-generation Intel Core CPU in your laptop? There's only one place on Earth for it
item.description: Dynabook and NEC revive optical drives in modern laptops, blending nostalgia with high-performance processors, high-res displays, and advanced connectivity.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: What changes to the CHIPS act could mean for AI growth and consumers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Even as he's vowed to push the United States ahead in artificial intelligence research, President Donald Trump's threats to alter federal government contracts with chipmakers and slap new tariffs on the semiconductor industry may put new speed bumps in front of the tech industry.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The Two Apple ID Problem: A Journey to Merging Accounts
item.description: Apple has finally developed an official way for users to automatically migrate digital purchases from one account to another, but it's not perfect and still leaves other associated data limitations.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: We're getting achingly closer to SOT-MRAM; the memory that could one day replace DRAM and NAND, but I can't see it happening soon
item.description: Researchers claim to have reached a goal that will allow SOT-MRAM to become reality sooner, just not too soon.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Trump's Stargate ambitions
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AMD’s RX 9070 GPUs could go on sale March 6, the day after Nvidia’s RTX 5070 – and I wouldn’t fret about those 900W power supply rumors
item.description: It seems that AMD is planning to unleash its RX 9070 graphics cards in a head-to-head battle with Nvidia’s RTX 5070.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: What is Starlink? How to get the satellite service for free on your phone with T-Mobile, plus everything you need to know
item.description: Starlink's satellite service is starting to hit the mainstream, with T-Mobile now offering it for free on compatible smartphones.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: OpenAI board unanimously rejects Elon Musk's $97.4 billion proposal
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — OpenAI says its board of directors has unanimously rejected a $97.4 billion takeover bid by Elon Musk. “OpenAI is not for sale, and the board has unanimously rejected Mr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: OpenAI board unanimously rejects Elon Musk's $97.4 billion proposal
item.description: OpenAI says its board of directors has unanimously rejected a $97.4 billion takeover bid by Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Just 32 percent in US trust AI: Study
item.description: Only about a third of Americans trust artificial intelligence (AI), according to new data from the Edelman Trust Barometer. Just 32 percent of people in the U.S. said they trust the rapidly developing technology, according to the annual global survey’s “Insights for the Technology Sector.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: TikTok returns to Apple and Google app stores in the US
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — TikTok has returned to the app stores of Apple and Google in the U.S., after President Donald Trump delayed the enforcement of a TikTok ban. TikTok, which is operated by Chinese technology firm ByteDance, was removed from Apple and Google’s app stores on Jan.
item.dc:creator: ZEN SOO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: For February’s Patch Tuesday, Microsoft rolls out 63 updates
item.description: Microsoft released 63 patches for Windows, Microsoft Office, and developer platforms in this week’s Patch Tuesday update. The February release was a relatively light update, but it comes with significant testing requirements for networking and remote desktop environments.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: NASCAR 25, the new game from iRacing, will put Daytona 500 fans in the driver’s seat
item.description: The Daytona 500 is one of the more challenging races on the NASCAR circuit. The speedway is long and narrow, forcing drivers to be more aggressive. And the weather in central Florida doesn’t always cooperate. During the 2024 event, a deluge of rain had forced a Monday conclusion.
item.dc:creator: Michael Callahan, Fast Company

item.title: Palo Alto Networks firewall bug being exploited by threat actors: Report
item.description: Admins with firewalls from Palo Alto Networks should make sure the devices are fully patched and the management interface blocked from open internet access after the discovery this week of a zero-day login authentication bypass in the PAN-OS operating system.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Netflix releases trailer for new western series Ransom Canyon and it looks like an exciting mix of Yellowstone and Virgin River
item.description: Netflix unveils trailer for new western series Ransom Canyon and it looks perfect for fans of Yellowstone and Virgin River.
item.dc:creator: grace.morris@futurenet.com (Grace Morris), TechRadar

item.title: Worrying YouTube security flaw exposed billions of user emails
item.description: Experts find a simple flaw could have exposed any email attached to a YouTube account until recently.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The NBA's tech summit turns 25 this year, and its return to the Bay Area is a full-circle moment
item.description: NBA Commissioner Adam Silver had no idea 25 years ago that the Tech Summit would turn into much of anything, much less one of the hottest tickets at All-Star weekend.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Nvidia, look away! OpenAI is almost ready to deliver first prototype of its AI GPU - General Processing Unit
item.description: OpenAI has partnered with Broadcom to design its own AI chip in a bid for some independence from Nvidia, and it's nearly ready.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: The scent of the mummy. Research discovers ancient Egyptian remains smell nice
item.description: Researchers who sniffed mummified remains in the name of science were greeted more with a blessing than a curse.
item.dc:creator: Brian Melley, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: TikTok returns to Apple, Google app stores amid Trump ban delay
item.description: The Chinese-owned app was removed from the stores after it briefly shut down in the U.S. to abide by a law that required TikTok’s parent company ByteDance to divest from the platform or face a Jan. 19 ban.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, WGN 9

item.title: TikTok returns to Apple, Google app stores amid Trump ban delay
item.description: TikTok returned to the Apple and Google app stores Thursday evening after President Trump delayed the ban on the video-sharing app last month. The Chinese-owned app was removed from the stores after it briefly shut down in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, The Hill

item.title: What to make of JD Vance’s speech at the Paris AI summit
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: SpaceX’s Starbase site inches closer to being its own city in Texas
item.description: A Texas county on Wednesday approved holding an election sought by SpaceX that would let residents living around billionaire Elon Musk’s company decide whether to formally create a new city called Starbase.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Bristling at 'Gulf of Mexico' name change on maps, Mexico says it might sue Google
item.description: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum says her government is not ruling out filing a civil lawsuit against Google if it maintains its stance of calling the stretch of sea between northeastern Mexico and the southeastern United States the “Gulf of America.”.
item.dc:creator: Fabiola Sânchez, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Scout Motors' effort to directly sell its electric SUVs where they'll make them stalls
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Legislation to let Volkswagen-backed Scout Motors sell its electric SUVs directly to people in South Carolina, where the vehicles will be built, has stalled after fierce opposition from traditional automobile dealers.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Italian government denies it spied on journalists and migrant activists using Paragon spyware
item.description: ROME (AP) — The Italian government denied Wednesday that it had spied on journalists and migrant activists using spyware but said it would cooperate with an investigation into “vulnerabilities” after at least seven Italian cellphones were apparently hacked with military-grade surveillance technology
item.dc:creator: NICOLE WINFIELD and PAOLO SANTALUCIA, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: What can we learn from insulin price reductions
item.description: The Fast Company Impact Council is a private membership community of influential leaders, experts, executives, and entrepreneurs who share their insights with our audience. Members pay annual membership dues for access to peer learning and thought leadership opportunities, events and more.
item.dc:creator: Dorothy Gemmell, Fast Company

item.title: Thomson Reuters scores early win in AI copyright battles in the US
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Thomson Reuters has won an early battle in court over the question of fair use in artificial intelligence-related copyright cases.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Showing memory usage in Linux by process and user
item.description: There are a lot of tools for looking at memory usage on Linux systems. Some are commonly used commands like ps, while others are tools like top that allow you to display system performance stats in various ways.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: DeepSeek
item.description: DeepSeek, founded in 2023 by Liang Wenfeng, a Chinese entrepreneur, engineer and former hedge fund manager, is generating a lot of buzz — and for good reason. Here are five things that make it stand out (as well as a listing of the latest news and analysis about DeepSeek).
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Yes, you can still upgrade Windows 10 PCs to Windows 11
item.description: Windows 10 has less than a year left before it hits its end of support deadline. Starting in October 2025, you’ll have to pay for security updates if you want to keep using Microsoft’s nearly-nine-year-old operating system.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Ukraine's rare earth elements could help keep US military aid flowing
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine has offered to strike a deal with U.S. President Donald Trump for continued American military aid in exchange for developing Ukraine’s mineral industry, which could provide a valuable source of the rare earth elements that are essential for many kinds of technology.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The cloud giants stumble
item.description: Recent financial results from the major cloud providers reveal a concerning trend in cloud adoption and growth. AWS reported just 13% growth in the final quarter of 2023, Microsoft Azure saw 19% growth, and Google Cloud achieved 26% growth—all below market expectations.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: ESA’s space telescope Euclid discovers ‘astonishing' Einstein ring
item.description: The European Space Agency's Euclid space telescope was going through preliminary tests in September 2023 when it captured images of an Einstein Ring in a nearby galaxy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: News influencers favored Trump over Harris during campaign, study finds
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Americans who followed news influencers during the presidential campaign were more likely to hear positive reports about Donald Trump than they were about Kamala Harris, a study has revealed.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Debate about political CIOs takes on new life with OPM memo
item.description: Agencies have until Friday to decide if they want to reclassify their CIOs as “general” Senior Executive Service positions instead of “career reserve.” The post Debate about political CIOs takes on new life with OPM memo first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: A new interpreter in Python 3.14 delivers a free speed boost
item.description: Python 3.14, due out later this year, is set to receive a new type of interpreter that can boost performance by up to 30% with no changes to existing code. The CPython 3.14 change log describes the feature as “a new type of interpreter based on tail calls.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The future is far from doom and gloom for DBAs
item.description: Database administration has always been something of a well kept secret. Even within the wider domain of information technology, database administration is one of those areas of expertise that often goes overlooked by aspiring STEM students and tech-savvy job seekers.
item.dc:creator: Info World
